svg.title: Angular ClientApp src/app/ structure
svg.desc: Five vertical zones — config, core, shared, layouts, features — hanging from the AppComponent root. Each zone contains clearly spaced nodes. Dashed arrows show permitted dependency directions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does AppComponent do beyond rendering the router-outlet — auth gate, loading signal, global error boundary?')
sendPrompt('What providers and initializers live in ApplicationConfig?')
sendPrompt('How does runtime-config load /config.json before bootstrap and expose it via RUNTIME_CONFIG token?')
sendPrompt('What PrimeNG globals and theme tokens does primeng.config.ts configure?')
sendPrompt('What do the config barrel exports look like?')
sendPrompt('What is the split between AuthService façade and AuthStore ngrx signalStore?')
sendPrompt('What are the 8 functional interceptors and what is their registration order?')
sendPrompt('What does each guard protect: authGuard, permissionGuard, anyPermissionGuard, roleGuard, unsavedChangesGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does CustomPreloader decide which routes to preload — data.preload flag and Save-Data header?')
sendPrompt('What primitives does BaseEntityStore expose and what does cache-invalidation-bus publish?')
sendPrompt('What does BaseApiService provide — typed HTTP methods, URL shaping, error mapping to ApiError?')
sendPrompt('What reactive-forms helpers and custom validators live in core/forms?')
sendPrompt('What do NavbarConfigService, StatusBannerService, LoadingService, and CorrelationContextService each own?')
sendPrompt('What are RouteMetadata, CurrentUser, ApiError, and EffectivePermissions — interfaces or classes?')
sendPrompt('What does the dph universal data-table component support — virtual scroll, column config, sort, filter?')
sendPrompt('When should each feedback component be used: empty-state vs error-state vs skeleton-card vs loading-overlay?')
sendPrompt('What does page-header render and what projection slots does it expose?')
sendPrompt('What does status-badge render and how does status-banner publish cross-app notifications?')
sendPrompt('What does session-expiring-dialog show and how does router-error-boundary catch component-level exceptions?')
sendPrompt('How does platform-navbar implement config-driven multi-domain navigation with NAVBAR_CONFIG_PROVIDER?')
sendPrompt('What directives live in shared — permission-based visibility, click-outside, auto-focus?')
sendPrompt('What does AppShellComponent render: navbar, sub-nav, status banners, footer, router-outlet?')
sendPrompt('When does auth-layout activate — is it a sibling route of app-shell or a named outlet?')
sendPrompt('Does error-layout share the navbar with app-shell or render minimal chrome for error pages?')
sendPrompt('What signals and widgets does the dashboard feature own?')
sendPrompt('How does LoginComponent trigger the BFF OIDC redirect — anchor or programmatic navigation?')
sendPrompt('How is UsersStore provided inside the users route subtree rather than at application root?')
sendPrompt('Are forbidden, server-error, offline, maintenance, and not-found all standalone components with dedicated routes?')
sendPrompt('What ESLint module-boundary rules should prevent features from importing each other?')

svg.text: Dependency rule — features → shared + core only · shared → core only · core → nothing above
